    1. CsvFile()

Class CsvFile

java.lang.Object
io.bloviate.file.FileDefinition
io.bloviate.file.CsvFile
public class CsvFile extends FileDefinition
FileDefinition for comma-delimited (CSV) output. Fields are separated by a comma (,).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CsvFile()
    Constructs a new CSV file definition using the FileType.CSV format.
